/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -current_version 0.11.1 -o libggml.0.11.1.dylib -install_name @rpath/libggml.0.dylib "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src/ggml-metal libggml-cpu.0.11.1.dylib ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.11.1.dylib ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.11.1.dylib libggml-base.0.11.1.dylib
